## Canonical hardware (all edge claims)

- **Raspberry Pi 5 — 16GB**  
- **Hailo-10H** 40 TOPS (AI Accelerator / AI HAT+ 2)  
- Local LLM: Ollama + `gemma4:e4b` (and Aether vision models as documented)

## Hybrid hosts

Windows 10/11 + Linux for development; RPi for production edge. Useful for dual-platform capability narratives in R&D plans.
